domain_hint: Finite-element fatigue analysis of a porous titanium spinal fusion cage implant (TFC-7), Abaqus/Standard, ASTM F2077 correlation
ambiguity_notes: (1) Mesh density contradiction — AIMG memo states fine mesh used for production runs but solver log shows coarse mesh in the actual regulatory model (Slides 4 and 13/OI-01). (2) Fatigue limit material property disputed — 500 MPa from literature vs. 430 MPa from internal coupon campaign, both in active circulation, directly affecting fatigue life predictions (Slides 6 and 7). (3) Applied load magnitude inconsistency — executive summary states 1,200 N peak load but Abaqus input file back-calculates to ~1,450 N (21% discrepancy) (Slide 9). (4) Model-to-test fatigue correlation — model predicts infinite life at test loads using the officially-used material value, yet physical specimens cracked; agreement only achieved with the disputed lower fatigue limit (Slide 7).
